# zabbix_user_directory_saml (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix SAML user directory by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "zabbix_user_directory_saml" "okta" {
  name = "Okta SSO"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the user directory. One of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Display name of the user directory. One of `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the user directory.
- `encrypt_assertions` (String) Whether SAML assertions are encrypted: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `encrypt_nameid` (String) Whether NameID is encrypted: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `group_name` (String) Name of the IdP attribute that carries group membership.
- `idp_entityid` (String) IdP entity ID.
- `nameid_format` (String) NameID format.
- `provision_groups` (Attributes List) IdP group to Zabbix role and user groups mappings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provision_groups))
- `provision_media` (Attributes List) IdP attribute to Zabbix media type mappings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provision_media))
- `provision_status` (String) Whether JIT provisioning is enabled: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `scim_status` (String) Whether SCIM provisioning is enabled: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `sign_assertions` (String) Whether SAML assertions are signed: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `sign_authn_requests` (String) Whether AuthnRequests are signed: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `sign_logout_requests` (String) Whether logout requests are signed: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `sign_logout_responses` (String) Whether logout responses are signed: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `sign_messages` (String) Whether SAML messages are signed: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `slo_url` (String) IdP SLO service URL.
- `sp_entityid` (String) SP entity ID.
- `sso_url` (String) IdP SSO service URL.
- `user_lastname` (String) IdP attribute mapped to the Zabbix user last name.
- `user_username` (String) IdP attribute mapped to the Zabbix user first name.
- `username_attribute` (String) SAML attribute used as the Zabbix username.

<a id="nestedatt--provision_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `provision_groups`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Name of the IdP group.
- `role_id` (String) ID of the Zabbix role.
- `user_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of Zabbix user group IDs.


<a id="nestedatt--provision_media"></a>
### Nested Schema for `provision_media`

Read-Only:

- `active` (String) Whether the media is active: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `attribute` (String) IdP attribute value.
- `media_type_id` (String) ID of the Zabbix media type.
- `name` (String) Name of the provision media entry.
- `period` (String) Active time period.
- `severity` (Number) Severity bitmask.
